title: DragonMine Z: Age System
description: An add-on for DragonMine Z that adds an age system.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a80b57520e32776eb551088f1b133a9701535d4.png)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The addon adds a TP multiplier based on age. The age/TP Multiplier relationship depends on the race: Humans have a smooth curve; Saiyans experience much more pronounced changes and have a longer training age range (as Vegeta mentions in the anime, Saiyans maintain a youthful form longer to stay ready for battle); Androids (human-based) and Bio-Androids have a constant TP Multiplier and do not age; Namekians reach their golden age at 100 years old; and finally, Frost Demons have greater longevity.

This mod also adds a penalty to the HTC: time passes faster inside it. The speed at which time flows is determined by the TP multiplier of that dimension (default: x2.5).

The mod also introduces visual changes based on age:

### **SIZE**
- 1–10 years: size x0.5
- 11–20 years: size x0.75
- 21–40 years: size x1
- 41–60 years: size x0.95
- Over 60 years: size x0.9

### **HAIR COLOR**
- 1-55 years: normal color
- 56-69 years: grayish tone
- Over 70 years: gray

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### **CONFIG FILE**

The config file allows you to modify how many in-game days make up a year for your character, set the age your character returns to when wishing to rejuvenate with Shenron, and add multipliers to the age-based TP multipliers.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you enjoy the project and would like to support me, you can do so on Ko-fi. That said, there’s absolutely no obligation, since this is a non-profit project.
